description: Represents an activity message associated with a business-client interaction. Activity messages are created automatically by the system for various activity types (e.g., meetings, invoices, payments) or manually via the invite activity type. Each message captures the communication context including direction, channels, and activity-specific metadata.

uid.description: Unique identifier for the activity message record.

business_uid.description: Unique identifier of the business associated with this activity message.

staff_uid.description: Unique identifier of the staff member associated with this activity message.

client_uid.description: Unique identifier of the client this activity message is associated with.

activity_type.description: The type of activity this message is associated with. Determines the category of the underlying business event (e.g., "meeting" for scheduled appointments, "invoice" for billing documents, "invite" for manual client invitations to schedule).

activity_action.description: The specific action or status related to the activity type (e.g., "scheduled" for a meeting that was booked, "created" for a newly generated invoice, "schedule" for an invite action). Values vary depending on the activity_type.

direction.description: The direction of the activity message. Possible values: "pivot_to_client" — message sent from the business to the client; "client_to_pivot" — message sent from the client to the business; "to_pivot" — system notification delivered to the business side; "to_client" — system notification delivered to the client side.

channels.description: The communication channels through which the message was sent or should be sent.

message_text.description: The textual content of the activity message.

body.description: The main content of the message. For SMS messages, the maximum length is 550 characters. For email messages, the maximum length is 50,000 characters.

subject.description: A concise summary or title of the message content. For invite activity types, this is a user-provided subject. For other activity types, it is automatically derived from the activity (e.g., appointment title, invoice number).

cta_button_text.description: The text displayed on the call-to-action button in the email message (e.g., "Schedule now", "View Invoice", "View Appointment"). Automatically derived for system-generated activity messages.

link_url_params.description: URL parameters appended to the action button link in emails or the SMS link. Useful for tracking campaign attribution (e.g., UTM parameters).

meeting_data.description: Additional metadata about the associated meeting. Only present when activity_type is "meeting".

service_uid.description: Unique identifier of the service associated with the meeting.

service_name.description: Display name of the service associated with the meeting (e.g., "Initial Consultation", "Follow-up Session").

start_time.description: The scheduled start time of the meeting in ISO 8601 format (e.g., "2026-03-15T14:00:00Z").

duration.description: Duration of the meeting in minutes (e.g., 30, 60).

interaction_type.description: The type of interaction for the meeting (e.g., "in_person", "video", "phone").

created_at.description: The date and time when the activity message was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the activity message was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.
